title: Love, Sacrifice, and Ethics as Relational Stability Mechanisms
one_sentence: This module defines love, sacrifice, and ethics as relational stability mechanisms after irreversible coupling and shared-attractor formation.

core_compression.love: another system's persistence enters internal evaluation
core_compression.ethics: discrimination between real and phantom shared attractors

negative_constraints: Do not treat love as sentiment alone.
Do not treat sacrifice as moral virtue or self-destruction justification.
Do not treat ethics as a normative moral code.
Do not treat this module as legal or institutional ethics.
